hero.title: Packers & Movers in Chennai
hero.subtitle: T. Nagar to OMR, Anna Nagar to Velachery — 1,000+ verified movers across Chennai.

intro:
Chennai's coastal climate and dense neighborhoods mean movers need to know the city well. Radhe packers and movers gives you 1,000+ verified packers and movers across Chennai — T. Nagar, Velachery, Anna Nagar, Adyar, OMR, Porur, Tambaram and more.

Instant quotes, transparent pricing, and vendors that handle everything from old chettinad homes to modern IT corridor apartments.
whyUs: Chennai humidity is tough on packing — our vendors use moisture-resistant materials and plastic wrapping for electronics and fabrics. We also handle OMR traffic planning, coastal relocation routes, and coordinate carefully around monsoon months.

faqs.q: What do packers and movers cost in Chennai?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves from ₹4,800. 2 BHK moves typically ₹8,000 – ₹14,000 within the city.

faqs.q: Do you cover OMR and ECR?
faqs.a: Yes — all of Chennai Metropolitan Area including OMR, ECR, GST Road, Ambattur and Tambaram.
Our vendors use waterproof wrapping during monsoon months and offer free rescheduling for heavy-rain days.
Yes — ₹5 lakh transit damage protection is included on every booking.
